publishedAbstract: * 'noobaa-endpoint' pod shows `Readiness probe failed: dial tcp 10.10.10.10:6001` in an OpenShift Container Storage cluster ~~~ Warning Unhealthy 16m kubelet, ip-10-0-0-0.xx-west-1.compute.internal Readiness probe failed: dial tcp 10.10.10.10:6001: connect: connection refused ~~~
publishedTitle: noobaa-endpoint  pod reports Readiness probe failed: dial tcp 10.10.10.10:6001
